LanguageData.SR.About.Name: Squeaky Ratkin
LanguageData.SR.About.Description:
Squeaky Ratkin is a lightweight sound effect mod that injects a little stir into the Ratkin experience. It brings a whimsical medley of chirps and squeaks to these once-silent little critters, ensuring every action comes with... a little sound things. No longer shall the colonies and the world beyond echo solely with the lamentations of blood and fire - the whispered squeaks of the ratkin will remind you that though they may be small, they are never content to remain silent.
*Not eligible for registration in The Book of Squeakudges*
LanguageData.SR.UseCustomOnly.Label: Custom audio full override
LanguageData.SR.UseCustomOnly.Desc: ON: only custom audio (SR_*_Pure). OFF: custom + vanilla default (guinea-pig) mixed.
LanguageData.SR.ScaleCooldownWithTimeSpeed.Label: Scale trigger cooldown with time speed (recommended)
LanguageData.SR.ScaleFrequencyWithTalking.Label: Scale squeak frequency with Talking capacity
LanguageData.SR.LocalizeDebugActions.Label: Localize debug actions with this mod's translations (reopen the debug actions menu)
LanguageData.SR.GlobalCooldownMultiplier.Label: Global trigger interval: {0}x
LanguageData.SR.Distance.Desc: The attenuation band uses the vanilla camera-height scale (15-65) as its tuning reference. In-map sounds stay full below {0}, fade between {0} and {1}, and are silent above {1}. Workbench preview is not distance-attenuated.
LanguageData.SR.Workbench.Header.Desc: Edit mood-based pitch and volume overrides, then preview them with any configured action. Disabled overrides use the XML defaults.
